title: viburnum subalpinum var. limitaneum
intro: Viburnum subalpinum var. limitaneum is a lesser-known variety of the viburnum plant species, known for its small, fragrant white flowers and its ability to thrive in high-altitude mountainous regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viburnum subalpinum var. limitaneum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
